room.caption: [NightmareA2] Koopa-Jumping, Kaizo edition.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(101) global.mapTeleport=1
backFollowFore=instance_create(0,0,oBackgroundFollow) backFollowFore.type=2 backFollowFore.backSet=backMarioA backFollowFore.xMoveScale=0.6 backFollowFore.yMoveScale=1 backFollowFore.depth=1499999
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvExGates)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(101) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Use the menu teleport function if it's too much for you, which can be found in the 'Progress' submenu." signSize=2
